titleStmt.title: SII 30.22: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 22. (A.R. No. 99 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the west and south walls of the same maṇḍapa Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān: year 15+1: 1223 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records gift of the village Niyamam alias Vīrarājēndra-nallūr on the south Bank in Vaḍaparisāra-nāḍu for providing food offerings, worship, and repairs, to the shrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-nāchchiyār named Irugunuṇṇiḍai maṅgaiyār of this temple for the merit of Āṇḍakkaṉ. All the taxes (iṟaipuravu) such as chiṟṟāyam, elavai, ukavai, maṉṟupāḍu teṇḍakuṟṟam, vēṇḍukōḷ, eruttiṟai, sumai-suṅgam, sārikai and others were granted to the temple. Ārutakottikkōyilāṉ Toṇḍaṉ Nampiḷḷāṉ alias Brahmarāyaṉ, Nakkaṉdēvaṉ, Nakkaṉpotti, Siṟunakkaṉpotti, Tonṟi-tonṟi, all belonging to Ātrēyagōtra were given the right of one maṉrāṭṭu, while Periyacheṭṭi-piḷḷāṉ, Cheṭṭi-Kēsaṉ, Cheṭṭi-Siṟukēsaṉ all belonging to Kāśyapagōtra were collectively given one maṉrāṭṭu, and Kēsan Kaṇṇaṉ, Kaṇṇaṉ Pāṇḍavataraiyaṉ, Kōvaṉ-Kiḷḷai all belonging to Pūluva Vēṭṭuva were given the right of ūrāḷmai. It is also stated that the above persons had been invested with the responsibility of looking after the settled people and the right of colonizing the village with new families into Vaḍaparisāra-nāḍu. It is stipulated that Poṉṉaṉ-piḷḷāṉ, alias Īśvarabhaṭṭa of Kāśyapagōtra, the priest of the temple is responsible for carrying out the repair works. Ellāmvalla Sōḻa-mūvēndavēḷaṉ, Tiyāgavinōdhaṉ, Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvanaccakkaravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭān Āḷuṭaiyār tirumurukanpūṇṭi nāyanāṟku Āṇṭakkanukku nanṟāka tirukkāmakkoṭṭa nācciyār Iruku AṇṇaṭaiRead- iṟukunuṇṇiṭaimaṅkaiyārai Eḻuntaruḷuvi Innāc
ṟ tevar kanmikaḷukku nammolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Innācciyāṟku Amutupaṭikkum pūcaikkum muppattiraṇṭu tiruvaṟattukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka viṭṭuk kuṭuttavūr vaṭaparicāra nāṭṭu tenkarai niyamamāna virarācentira nallū
tānamāka Eṟṟikkoḷvārākavum Ivvūrkellai paḻaiya nānkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nancey punceyāl vanta Iṟaipuravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai Ukavai manṟupāṭu teṇṭakuṟṟam veṇṭukoḷ Eruttiṟai tamaiRead- cumaicuṅkañ cārikai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Inā
pattiraṇṭaṟattukkum Udakam paṇṇik kuṭuttamaiyil Ivvūṟku nam cāmantar kanmikaḷ pukku Ārāyak kaṭavarallavākavum Innācciyār kanmikaḷe Ārāyvārākavum Ivvūṟku manṟāṭṭu Āttirayakottirattuk koyilāna toṇṭanukkum manṟāṭṭonṟum Āru
tu nampi piḷḷanāṉa piramamārāyanukku manṟāṭṭonṟum Āttiraya kottirattu nakkantevanukku manṟāṭṭonṟum Āttiraya kottirattu nakkanpottikku manṟāṭṭonṟum Āttirayakottirattu ciṟunakkan pottikkum tonṟi tonṟikkum
m kāśyapa kottirattu periyaceṭṭi piḷḷanukkum ceṭṭi kecanukkum ceṭṭi ciṟukkecanukku manṟāṭṭonṟum Ūrāḷmai pūluvar veṭṭuvariṟ kecan kaṇṇanukkonṟum kaṇṇaṉ pāṇṭavataraiyanukkum kovan kaḷḷaikkum Ūrāḷmai Onṟu
piyum Āka vaṭaparicāra nāṭ vaikkuṭi ḷḷitu Eṟakkaṭavatallavākavum maṟṟuḷḷa kuṭikaḷ Ēṟṟik koḷvārākavum Innāyanārp pūcikku nampiyār kāśyapa kottirattu ponnan piḷḷanāna Īśvarapaṭṭanāna nācciyā
ruḷvicca Ivvū tiruppaṇiyuñ ceyvippānākavum ṉa Īcarapaṭṭa Iṉpoṉṉākaiyuṭāṉācciyāraiyum Ivarmakkaḷ makkaḷ pārkaḷā kavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai celvatāka cem
koḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷāka nam nām IrppeṟRead- eppeṟpaṭṭapaṭṭaṉavum Eṟpaṭuttik kuṭukka Ivai Ellāmvalla coḻa muveṉta veḷāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvataṟketirāvatu ḷkoṇ
Ivai (kā)kāṭuveṭṭi yataraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai tiyākaviṉotaṉe[ḻuttu Ivaikaḷappāḷarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai vilāṭaciṅka Ivai ṉ Eḻuttu
Itu panmākeśvara rakṣai Itu māṟṟu(vā)vāṉ
Digital edition of SII 30.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
